/Applications/ArmGNUToolchain/15.2.rel1/arm-none-eabi/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard --sysroot=/Applications/ArmGNUToolchain/15.2.rel1/arm-none-eabi/bin/../arm-none-eabi -T/Users/iosifsot/Documents/ASB-Supervisor/STM32F446RETX_FLASH.ld -lc -lm -specs=nano.specs -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,-Map=/Users/iosifsot/Documents/ASB-Supervisor/build/ASBCodeV2.map,--cref -Wl,--print-memory-usage CMakeFiles/ASBCodeV2.elf.dir/Core/Src/can_mcu.c.obj
